emails.subject: commitment
emails.body: commitment Anyone up for a sat night outing? By the way, I don't know if you've read the front page of the Houston Chronicle today but I have committed to UCLA. The Bruin Athletic Department is researching my remaining eligiblity.

emails.subject: Re: commitment
emails.body: Re: commitment nice. i knew that would be a better choice. saturday night is on dog. we are going to golf sat also if you are in. let me know. tee time is at 11.

emails.subject: Re: commitment
emails.body: I'm already playing golf with some friend on sat but yours sounds like a much better tee time. Mine is at 7:45 a.m---that blows. Matthew Lenhart@ECT 05/02/2001 11:59 AM
